2603.27349.title: Inference-Time Structural Reasoning for Compositional Vision-Language Understanding
2603.27349.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) excel at image-text retrieval yet persistently fail at compositional reasoning, distinguishing captions that share the same words but differ in relational structure. We present, a unified evaluation and augmentation framework benchmarking four architecturally diverse VLMs,CLIP, BLIP, LLaVA, and Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking,on the Winoground benchmark under plain and scene-graph-augmented regimes. We introduce a dependency-based TextSceneGraphParser (spaCy) extracting subject-relation-object triples, and a Graph Asymmetry Scorer using optimal bipartite matching to inject structural relational priors. Caption ablation experiments (subject-object masking and swapping) reveal that Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking achieves a group score of 62.75, far above all encoder-based models, while a proposed multi-turn SG filtering strategy further lifts it to 66.0, surpassing prior open-source state-of-the-art. We analyze the capability augmentation tradeoff and find that SG augmentation benefits already capable models while providing negligible or negative gains for weaker baselines. Code: https://github.com/amartyacodes/Inference-Time-Structural-Reasoning-for-Compositional-Vision-Language-Understanding
2603.27349.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在圖像-文本檢索方面表現出色，但在組合推理方面持續失敗，無法區分共享相同單詞但在關係結構上不同的標題。<lb/>我們提出了一個統一的評估和增強框架，對四種架構多樣的VLMs進行基準測試，分別是CLIP、BLIP、LLaVA和Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking，並在Winoground基準下進行普通和場景圖增強的測試。<lb/>我們引入了一個基於依賴的TextSceneGraphParser（spaCy），提取主題-關係-對象三元組，以及一個使用最佳二分匹配的圖不對稱評分器，以注入結構性關係先驗。<lb/>標題消融實驗（主題-對象掩蔽和交換）顯示Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking的組分數達到62.75，遠高於所有基於編碼器的模型，而提出的多輪SG過濾策略進一步將其提升至66.0，超越了先前的開源最先進技術。<lb/>我們分析了能力增強的權衡，發現SG增強對於已經具備能力的模型有益，而對於較弱的基準則提供微不足道或負面的增益。<lb/>代碼：https://github.com/amartyacodes/Inference-Time-Structural-Reasoning-for-Compositional-Vision-Language-Understanding
2603.27349.author: Amartya Bhattacharya et.al.
